case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JUAN IGNACIO AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JORGE RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT JUAN IGNACIO AGUILAR DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
